name: Standard Relay Installation
description: Basic installation guide for relays and relay modules

steps.title: Gather Required Materials
steps.content: Collect all necessary parts, tools, and documentation before beginning installation.

steps.title: Review Wiring Diagram
steps.content: Study the wiring diagram to understand terminal connections and wire routing.
steps.tip: Mark the diagram with highlighter for complex circuits.

steps.title: Verify Part Numbers
steps.content: Check that all part numbers match the BOM and wiring list specifications.
steps.warning: Do not proceed if part numbers do not match specifications.

stages.notes: Proper preparation prevents problems during installation.

steps.title: Mount Relay Socket
steps.content: Secure the relay socket to the DIN rail using the locking tab. Ensure proper seating.

steps.title: Insert Relay
steps.content: Align the relay pins with the socket and press firmly until seated. Verify all pins are engaged.
steps.warning: Do not force the relay - pins should align naturally.
steps.tip: Listen for a click when the relay is fully seated.

steps.title: Install Marking Tags
steps.content: Apply component identification tags per the panel layout drawing.

steps.title: Connect Coil Wiring
steps.content: Connect the coil terminals (A1, A2) per the wiring diagram. Observe polarity for DC coils.
steps.warning: Verify coil voltage matches power supply before connecting.

steps.title: Connect Contact Wiring
steps.content: Wire the normally open (NO) and normally closed (NC) contacts as specified.
steps.tip: Use color-coded wire per company standards for easy identification.

steps.title: Dress and Secure Wires
steps.content: Route wires neatly along wire ways. Use cable ties at appropriate intervals.

steps.title: Complete Cross Connections
steps.content: Make any cross-connections between relays and other components as shown on the wiring diagram.

steps.title: Verify Wire Tags
steps.content: Ensure all wire tags are legible and match the wire list.

steps.title: Continuity Check
steps.content: Perform continuity test on all wired connections using multimeter.
steps.warning: Ensure power is disconnected before testing.

steps.title: Functional Test
steps.content: Apply power and verify relay operation. Check that contacts switch properly.
steps.tip: Listen for audible click when relay energizes.
